feed.title: Docket updates for Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
feed.rights: Created for the public domain by Free Law Project

entry.title: Entry #16 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: SCHEDULING ORDER: Initial Pretrial Conference set for 4/15/2026 at 11:00 AM in Alexandria Courtroom 400 before US Magistrate Judge William B. Porter. Final Pretrial Conference set for 8/20/2026 at 10:00 AM in Alexandria Telephonically before District Judge Anthony J. Trenga. Discovery due by 8/14/2026. Signed by District Judge Anthony J. Trenga on 3/24/2026. (Attachments: # (1) Magistrate Consent, # (2) Pretrial Notice)(dzir)

entry.title: Entry #15 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Request for Hearing by Tesla, Inc. in re [12] MOTION to Dismiss Complaint Pursuant to 12(b)(1) and 12(b)(3) and Compel Arbitration (Hooe, Laura)

entry.title: Entry #14 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220

entry.title: Entry #12 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: MOTION to Dismiss Complaint Pursuant to 12(b)(1) and 12(b)(3) and Compel Arbitration by Tesla, Inc. (Hooe, Laura)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-03-24 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Notice of Correction in re 15 Request for Hearing. The filing user is notified to refile the Notice of Hearing which requests a Wednesday date. (triv)

entry.title: Entry #11 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: WAIVER OF SERVICE Returned Executed by Susmita Maddi. Tesla, Inc. waiver sent on 1/23/2026, answer due 3/24/2026. (Yakubisin, Christopher)

entry.title: Entry #10 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: NOTICE of Appearance by Jonathan Monroe Petty on behalf of Susmita Maddi (Petty, Jonathan)

entry.title: Entry #9 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: NOTICE of Appearance by Michael G. Phelan on behalf of Susmita Maddi (Phelan, Michael)

entry.title: Entry #8 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: ORDER granting [6] Motion for Pro hac vice Appointed James Lee Mitchell for Susmita Maddi. Signed by District Judge Anthony J Trenga on 12/3/2025. (swil)

entry.title: Entry #7 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: ORDER granting [5] Motion for Pro hac vice Appointed Andrew Scott Bullard for Susmita Maddi. Signed by District Judge Anthony J Trenga on 12/3/2025. (swil)

entry.title: Entry #6 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Motion to appear Pro Hac Vice by James L. Mitchell and Certification of Local Counsel Christopher P. Yakubisin Filing fee $ 75, receipt number AVAEDC-10619843. by Susmita Maddi. (Attachments: # (1) Exhibit PHV Application)(Yakubisin, Christopher)

entry.title: Entry #5 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Motion to appear Pro Hac Vice by Andrew S. Bullard and Certification of Local Counsel Christopher P. Yakubisin Filing fee $ 75, receipt number AVAEDC-10619813. by Susmita Maddi. (Attachments: # (1) Exhibit PHV Application)(Yakubisin, Christopher)

entry.title: Entry #4 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Summons Issued as to Tesla, Inc., NOTICE TO ATTORNEY: Please remove the headers and print two duplexed copies of the electronically issued summons for each Defendant. Please serve one copy of the summons and a copy of the Complaint upon each Defendant. Please ensure that your process server returns the service copy (executed or unexecuted) to your attention and electronically file it using the filing events, Summons Returned Executed or Summons Returned Unexecuted. (Attachments: # (1) Summons Notice)(swil)

entry.title: Entry #3 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Citizenship Disclosure Form (Local Rule 7.1) by Susmita Maddi. (Yakubisin, Christopher)

entry.title: Entry #2 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Proposed Summons re [1] Complaint by Susmita Maddi (Yakubisin, Christopher)

entry.title: Entry #1 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Complaint ( Filing fee $ 405, receipt number AVAEDC-10617534.), filed by Susmita Maddi. (Attachments: # (1) Civil Cover Sheet)(Yakubisin, Christopher)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2025-12-01 in Maddi v. Tesla, Inc., 1:25-cv-02220
entry.summary: Initial Case Assignment to District Judge Anthony J Trenga and US Magistrate Judge William B. Porter. (swil)
